## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Files changed

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Governance / GitHub config
- [ ] Release metadata
- [ ] Notice policy

## Verification

- [ ] `git diff --check` is clean
- [ ] `release-manifest.json` parses cleanly
- [ ] Root docs still match the current product contract
- [ ] No secrets or private credentials were added

## Release impact

- [ ] No release impact
- [ ] Release notes need updating
- [ ] Release manifest / notices need updating

## Notes for reviewers

Call out any changes that affect release gating, notice handling, or installer ownership.
